name: Neon Grid Background
description: Subtle animated grid glow for hero and app shells.

name: Rolling Window Background
description: Horizontally sweeping light bars with depth blur.
usage: Hero Section

name: Terminal Header
description: Navigation bar styled like a futuristic command deck.
usage:
<TerminalHeader
  brand="CORP.SYS"
  links={[
    { label: 'About', href: '#' },
    { label: 'Features', href: '#' },
    { label: 'Pricing', href: '#' },
  ]}
  cta="Get Access"
/>

name: Glass Neon Header
description: Semi-transparent neon border header for landing pages.
usage:
<GlassNeonHeader
  brand="GLASS.CO"
  links={[
    { label: 'Work', href: '#' },
    { label: 'Studio', href: '#' },
  ]}
  cta="Book a Call"
/>

name: Type Glow Text
description: Typing-style text reveal with glow pulses.

name: Scanline Sweep
description: Vertical scan sweep for section separators and cards.
usage: Content with scanline effect

name: Hologram Title
description: Split-shadow heading with neon cyan accent.
usage:
<HologramTitle as="h1" className="text-5xl">
  System Override
</HologramTitle>

<HologramTitle as="h2" className="text-3xl">
  Subsystem Active
</HologramTitle>

name: Flicker Caption
description: Caption text with glitch flicker effect.

name: Jiggyasa Splash Loader
description: Animated epic quest splash screen with chaotic letterforms and neon glow.
source:
// JiggyasaSplash.jsx export default function JiggyasaSplash() { return (

SYSTEM BOOT SEQUENCE INITIATED...

J i g y a s a

WE MAKE LEARNING AN EPIC QUEST

); }

name: Mission Card
description: Gamified mission card with gradient border, XP reward, and progress bar.
source:
// MissionCard.jsx export default function MissionCard() { return (
{/* Inner dark card */}
{/* Scanline overlay effect */}
Mission 01 +500 XP

Mastering React Hooks

Infiltrate the state management facility and extract the useEffect protocols.

{/* Progress Bar */}
); }

name: User Profile Card
description: User stats display with level, rank, and achievement streak.
source:
// UserProfileCard.jsx export default function UserProfileCard() { return (
{/* Decorative background geometry */}
//

USER_DATA_STREAM

LVL.42 \"The Architect\"
  • INTEL_RATING: S-Tier
  • QUESTS_CLEARED: 108
  • CURRENT_STREAK: 14 DAYS
); }

name: Sandbox Grid Environment
description: Perspective grid with scanning beam and vignette for sandbox UI containers.
usage: CONTENT_HERE

name: Glitch Text Effect
description: Triple-layer glitch text with red/cyan offset and hover interaction.

name: Plasma Fill Button
description: Button with rising plasma fill effect, glare sweep, and corner accents.

name: Terminal Input
description: Sci-fi styled text input with HUD label, animated prompt, and blinking cursor.

name: Bounty Board
description: Leaderboard card displaying top operatives with ranks and scores.

name: Brutalist Stat Grid
description: 2x2 grid displaying stats with brutalist styling and hover effects.
source:
// BrutalistStatGrid.jsx export default function BrutalistStatGrid() { return (
QUESTS 142
STREAK 12d
CLASS Vanguard
XP RATE +2.5x
); }

name: Kill Switch Toggle
description: Mechanical toggle switch with hardcore mode styling.

name: Brutalist Button
description: Solid button with aggressive shadow and corner decorations.

name: Ghost Protocol Button
description: Button with expanding corner borders and glow on hover.

name: Glitch Button
description: Button with red/cyan glitch effect layers and scanlines.

name: Hacker Grid
description: Canvas-based particle system with mouse interaction.

name: Void Pulse
description: Canvas-based ripple effect triggered by click.

name: Glitch Noise
description: Canvas-based noise effect with mouse interaction zones.

name: Cipher Text
description: Animated character reveal with cipher glitch effect and neon glow.

name: Mech Energy Bar
description: Mechanical energy bar with segmented display and neon glow.

name: Override Modal
description: Warning modal with cyberpunk hazard styling and animations.
usage:
<OverrideModal isOpen={true} onClose={() => {}} title=\"CRITICAL ERROR\">
  Proceed with caution.
</OverrideModal>

name: Algorithm Terminal
description: Boot-sequence terminal that reveals algorithm code in stages.

name: Retro Achievement
description: Clickable 8-bit achievement badge with XP reward styling.

name: Hex Node Badge
description: Rotating hex node emblem with rank glyph and status label.
